message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "Frontend" as Frontend
participant "ReservationService" as ReservationService
participant "TicketRepository" as TicketRepository
participant "EventBus" as EventBus
participant "TicketMasterService" as TicketMasterService
participant "TicketMasterRepository" as TicketMasterRepository
participant "OrderManager" as OrderManager
participant "DB" as DB

actor User
participant Frontend

note right of Frontend
POST /reservations
{
  tickets: [
    {
      programId: 1,
      sectorId: 1,
      seatId: 5
    },
    {
      programId: 1,
      sectorId: 1,
      seatId: 6
    }
  ]
}
note right of ReservationService
CreateReservation
{
  reservation: {
    reservationId: "abc123"
    tickets: [
      {
        programId: 1,
        sectorId: 1,
        seatId: 5
      },
      {
        programId: 1,
        sectorId: 1,
        seatId: 6
      }
    ]
  }
}
note right of TicketMasterService
handle CreateReservation
check if all tickets are FREE
alt [ticket status = FREE]
  set status of tickets to RESERVED
  publish ReservationAccepted
alt [ticket status != FREE]
  publish ReservationRejected
end
note right of ReservationService
handle ReservationEvent
alt [ReservationAccepted]
  set status of tickets to RESERVED
alt [ReservationRejected]
  Noop
end
note right of Frontend
alt [ReservationAccepted]
  redirect user to Order page
alt [ReservationRejected]
  show error msg
end

User -> Frontend: reserve button
Frontend -> ReservationService: POST /reservations
ReservationService -> TicketRepository: validate tickets
ReservationService -> TicketRepository: createReservationCommand
ReservationService -> EventBus: publish CreateReservation
EventBus -> TicketMasterService: handle CreateReservation
TicketMasterService -> TicketMasterRepository: check if all tickets are FREE
TicketMasterService -> TicketMasterRepository: set status of tickets to RESERVED
TicketMasterService -> TicketMasterRepository: publish ReservationAccepted
ReservationService -> TicketMasterService: handle ReservationEvent
ReservationService -> TicketMasterRepository: Noop
ReservationService -> Frontend: publish ReservationEvent on websocket
Frontend -> User: redirect user to Order page
Frontend -> User: show error msg

TicketMasterService -> OrderManager: handle ReservationAccepted
OrderManager -> DB: save ReservedTicket object for each ticket

@enduml
